name: Gelato Di Crema
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat sugar and egg yolks together until pale yellow and very thick.
2. Slowly add milk, beating gently to avoid a build-up of foam.
3. Add lemon peel and stir in salt.
4. Transfer mixture to the top of a double boiler with an inch of boiling water in the bottom half.
5. Regulate heat so water remains at a low boil, and stir continuously for 8 minutes. The custard will thicken enough to coat the spoon, and surface foam will disappear.
6. Remove the top of the double boiler and set it in a large bowl of cold water. Stir for 2 minutes to cool the custard somewhat.
7. Transfer the custard to a bowl, cover, and set in the refrigerator to chill thoroughly. Also chill the whipping cream.
8. When ready to proceed, whip the cream into soft peaks. Remove lemon peel from the custard and fold in the whipped cream.
9. Transfer the mixture to an ice cream machine and freeze according to the machine's directions. Makes 1 Quart
